---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Aaron Robbins

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Business Intelligence & Analytics Leader
:::

::: {.hero-tagline}
12+ years turning messy data into decisions leaders trust — across healthcare, manufacturing, and financial analytics. I build across the modern analytics stack: SQL data models, cloud and local pipelines, financial analytics on public filings, and reporting non-technical teams actually use.
:::

::: {.hero-ctas}
[View Work](#cascadia-portfolio){.btn .btn-primary}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/aaron-robbins-6b25a2136/){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

---

## The Cascadia Portfolio {#cascadia-portfolio}

Cascadia is a portfolio of end-to-end analytics work — building the data systems, and leading how organizations run on them. Each piece matches the right tools to the problem: a governed SQL Server → Microsoft Fabric → Power BI enterprise stack, pragmatic local SQL Server + Power BI, lightweight Python and static-web analytics on public SEC and federal data, and the program side of BI — platform migration and metric governance. The through-line isn't one architecture; it's the craft: rigorous modeling, honest data governance, and decisions leaders can trust.

---

### Featured Case Studies

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
Financial Analytics
:::
### Cascadia Finance
<span class="badge-status">Live</span>

FormFactor (NASDAQ: FORM) GAAP financials from SEC EDGAR XBRL — an executive close pack in Python → SQLite → static ECharts, with frozen-snapshot governance and explicit GAAP-vs-non-GAAP labeling.

[View Case Study](projects/cascadia-semiconductors.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Live Module](https://robbinsanalytics.github.io/cascadia-semiconductors/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics/cascadia-semiconductors){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
BI Leadership / Governance
:::
### Cascadia BI Migration
<span class="badge-status">Playbook</span>

A 24-week program to migrate an organization off legacy BI onto a governed, AI-assisted platform — certified metric layer first, parity QA as the deliverable, wave-by-wave sunset. An illustrative program design.

[View Case Study](projects/cascadia-bi-migration.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
Healthcare / Staffing Marketplace
:::
### Cascadia Staffing
<span class="badge-status">Complete</span>

Contingent-labor economics for 14,362 U.S. nursing facilities on CMS payroll data — 21M staffing records, contract vs. employee hours by role and day, with a certified-measure governance layer validated against independent SQL.

[View Case Study](projects/cascadia-staffing.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics/cascadia-staffing-analytics){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
Healthcare / Pharmacy
:::
### Cascadia Pharmacy
<span class="badge-status">Complete</span>

GLP-1 spending trends (CMS Medicare Part D) and adult immunization coverage (CDC), with a messy/incomplete-data cleaning showcase.

[View Case Study](projects/cascadia-pharmacy.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics/cascadia-pharmacy-analytics){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
Manufacturing
:::
### Cascadia Medical Devices
<span class="badge-status">Complete</span>

A dimensional model over 5.9M production events plus real NASA turbofan sensor data, tracing a root-cause story from station degradation to on-time delivery.

[View Case Study](projects/cascadia-medical-devices.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics/manufacturing-analytics){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-label}
Retail
:::
### Cascadia Clothing
<span class="badge-status coming-soon">Coming Soon</span>

Demand, merchandising, and fulfillment analytics for a retail apparel scenario.

[Preview](projects/cascadia-clothing.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

:::

---

[Learn about the Cascadia architecture →](cascadia.qmd)
